waterDepth.notes: Το επίσημο προφίλ αναφέρει αβαθή πρώτα μέτρα και ήπια κλίση πυθμένα, με τα 5 μ. περίπου στα 330 μ. από την ακτή. Δεν αποτελεί live safety claim.

sourceNotes: Popular source-backed confidence pass AG 2026-06-02: official bathing-water profile and Blue Flag 2026 support Arkoudi identity/location in Ileia, Pinios Municipality. Promoted to high for static beach facts only; coordinates, photos, windProfile, scoring and live calm/protected/safe claims were not changed.

Pass AG static metadata: the official profile supports road-network access, sandy shore/seabed with rocks on the western side, shallow first metres with gentle seabed slope, umbrellas, loungers, showers, changing rooms, waste baskets, wooden access walkways, lifeguard base, beach-volleyball court, refreshment/cafe facilities and nearby tourist accommodation context. Unsupported natural-shade, parking, WC and separate beach-bar claims were removed. Source wind/protection wording was not imported into windProfile, scoring or live condition claims.

accessNotes.en: I episimi tavtotita Manoladas anaferei odiki prosvasi gia tin akti Brinias - Falari - Kounoupeli, choris na tekmirionei me asfaleia tin epifaneia tou dromou sto sygkekrimeno simeio.
accessNotes.gr: Η επίσημη ταυτότητα Μανολάδας αναφέρει οδική πρόσβαση για την ακτή Μπρίνιας - Φάλαρη - Κουνουπέλι, χωρίς να τεκμηριώνει με ασφάλεια την επιφάνεια του δρόμου στο συγκεκριμένο σημείο.

sourceNotes: Phase 2 Ileia OSM identity/location pass 2026-05-27: OpenStreetMap natural=beach same-name or compatible-name match is 0m from stored coordinates and supports identity/location only; confidence, access, services, and amenities remain unchanged pending stronger local or official sources.

Official bathing-profile cleanup 2026-05-29: the official Manolada bathing profile directly covers the Brinias - Falari - Kounoupeli coast and supports sandy shore/seabed with rocks at the northern end, shallow first meters, road access without confirmed surface, and partial organized facilities along the wider beach. Confidence promoted to medium; no wind, wave, water-quality, or live-condition claim was imported.

Popular source-backed confidence pass BC 2026-06-02: official Manolada bathing-water profile/PDF and OSM identity geometry support Kounoupeli as part of the Brinias - Falari - Kounoupeli coast in the Gulf of Kyllini, with 11,250 m wider beach length, 15 m average width, northwest orientation, sandy shore and seabed, rocks at the northern end, natural low-vegetation coastal zone, shallow first metres, gentle seabed slope, road access with unverified surface, partly organized wider beach sections, umbrellas, loungers, showers, changing rooms, waste bins and refreshment facilities with seating. Promoted to high for static metadata only; unsupported snorkeling/surfing app activity flags are pinned false. Source wind-protection, clear-water, water-quality and live-condition wording was not imported into windProfile, scoring or calm/protected/safe claims.

accessNotes.en: I Matzakoura vrisketai konta sto Katakolo kai anaferetai os paralia ston kolpo tou Agiou Andrea/archaias Feias. Oi piges ti deichnoun os mikri, pio fysiki akti me vrachodi stoicheia, ochi os pliros organomeni plaz.
accessNotes.gr: Η Ματζάκουρα βρίσκεται κοντά στο Κατάκολο και αναφέρεται ως παραλία στον κόλπο του Αγίου Ανδρέα/αρχαίας Φειάς. Οι πηγές τη δείχνουν ως μικρή, πιο φυσική ακτή με βραχώδη στοιχεία, όχι ως πλήρως οργανωμένη πλαζ.
accessNotes.fr: I Matzakoura vrisketai konta sto Katakolo kai anaferetai os paralia ston kolpo tou Agiou Andrea/archaias Feias. Oi piges ti deichnoun os mikri, pio fysiki akti me vrachodi stoicheia, ochi os pliros organomeni plaz.

waterDepth.label: Μέτρια νερά
waterDepth.notes: Η παραλία περιγράφεται ως φυσική/κλειστή ακτή για μπάνιο και snorkeling, αλλά δεν υπάρχει αρκετά ακριβής πηγή για σταθερά ρηχά νερά σε όλο το μήκος της.

metadata.sourceNotes: Popular-beach evidence pass 2026-06-02: OSM verifies the exact beach feature, Katakolon local guide identifies Matzakoura near Katakolon with a secluded natural-pool setting and mud/rock elements, and Unlimited Adrenaline identifies Matzakoura in the Ancient Feia sea-kayak/snorkeling route. Promoted to high for identity/access/terrain confidence; no wind profile, scoring, photos, or live-condition claims were changed.

Popular source-backed confidence pass BD 2026-06-02: official Manolada bathing-water profile/PDF and OSM identity geometry support Brinia as part of the Brinias - Falari - Kounoupeli coast in the Gulf of Kyllini, with 11,250 m wider beach length, 15 m average width, northwest orientation, sandy shore and seabed, natural low-vegetation coastal zone, shallow first metres, gentle seabed slope, road access with unverified surface, partly organized wider beach sections, umbrellas, loungers, showers, changing rooms, waste bins and refreshment facilities with seating. Promoted to high for static metadata only; terrain stays sandy for this stored Brinia point while the source's rocks-at-northern-end detail is not generalized onto the whole coast. Unsupported snorkeling/surfing app activity flags are pinned false. Source wind-protection, clear-water, water-quality and live-condition wording was not imported into windProfile, scoring or calm/protected/safe claims.

accessNotes.gr: Η επίσημη ταυτότητα Μανολάδας αναφέρει οδική πρόσβαση για την ακτή Μπρίνιας - Φάλαρη - Κουνουπέλι, χωρίς να τεκμηριώνει με ασφάλεια την επιφάνεια του δρόμου στο συγκεκριμένο σημείο.
accessNotes.fr: I episimi tavtotita Manoladas anaferei odiki prosvasi gia tin akti Brinias - Falari - Kounoupeli, choris na tekmirionei me asfaleia tin epifaneia tou dromou sto sygkekrimeno simeio.

orientation.notes: Generated from Natural Earth geospatial exposure facingDeg. This records shoreline-facing direction only; it does not verify shelter, low-wave behavior, or live sea conditions.

access.label: Οδική πρόσβαση, επιφάνεια μη επιβεβαιωμένη
access.notes: Η επίσημη ταυτότητα Μανολάδας αναφέρει οδική πρόσβαση για την ακτή Μπρίνιας - Φάλαρη - Κουνουπέλι, χωρίς να τεκμηριώνει με ασφάλεια την επιφάνεια του δρόμου στο συγκεκριμένο σημείο.

amenities: ομπρέλες και ξαπλώστρες σε τμήματα της ευρύτερης ακτής
ντους και αποδυτήρια σε τμήματα της ευρύτερης ακτής
κάδοι απορριμμάτων σε τμήματα της ευρύτερης ακτής

waterDepth.label: Ρηχά νερά
waterDepth.notes: Η επίσημη ταυτότητα Μανολάδας αναφέρει αβαθή πρώτα μέτρα και ήπια κλίση πυθμένα, με βάθος περίπου 5 μ. στα 275 μ. από την ακτή.

sourceNotes: Popular regions source pass 2026-06-02 B: the official Manolada bathing-water profile directly covers the Brinias - Falari - Kounoupeli coast and supports sandy shore/seabed, shallow first meters, road access without confirmed surface, partial organized facilities, umbrellas, sunbeds, showers, changing rooms, bins and refreshments on the wider beach. Static prevailing-wind/protected wording was not imported into windProfile, scoring, or live calm/protected/safe claims.

orientation.notes: Generated from Natural Earth geospatial exposure facingDeg. This records shoreline-facing direction only; it does not verify shelter, low-wave behavior, or live sea conditions.
